summary: P2-B3 computed KPI signals (#374): aggregates/computed_kpis.py implements 10 Postgres formulas + CSAT proxy; builder extends SYNCED_DATA_SOURCES; signals.py advisory-only with rules_proxy thresholds; Ads stay unavailable; 47 contract tests pass; no ML imports.

criticalFindings.description: return_request_rate still uses all-time order-level return_rate_proxy from aggregates, not 30d window; CSAT proxy correctly uses return_rate_30d.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Align return_request_rate with return_rate_30d in a follow-up if visual_layer requires consistent windows.

criticalFindings.description: ORDER_DISPATCH_SLA_HOURS=48 cites operational-limits.md FDR/LDR policy, not verified Partner API per-order SLA field.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Replace with Partner API SLA when schema verified; constant documented in MODULE.md per AC.

criticalFindings.description: 30d window filtering happens in compute_all_kpis after loading up to list_limit rows per table.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Add repo-level date filters when shop order volume exceeds list_limit.

interfaceChanges.description: ComputedKpiMetrics nested field with 10 Postgres KPI values + CSAT proxy inputs.
Pure multi-endpoint KPI rollup from orders, order_items, products, inventory_items, returns.
Emits live advisory signals for 10 Postgres KPIs + CSAT proxy when computed_kpis populated.

mappings.criterion: FeatureAggregateSnapshot extended with typed fields for all computable KPI metrics (10 + CSAT proxy inputs); SYNCED_DATA_SOURCES includes order_items and inventory_items.
computed_kpis.py (or equivalent under aggregates/) implements formulas above with documented null/edge policies (division-by-zero → null → signal unavailable).

compute_scoring_signals emits risk/opportunity/healthy (not unavailable) for the 10 Postgres KPIs + CSAT proxy when synced data suffices; Ads KPIs remain unavailable with reason "Chờ đồng bộ Promotion API".
Advisory one-liners match visual_layer.md format (What changed → Risk/Opportunity → Action); workflow_keys unchanged from kpi_catalog.py.
multi endpoint integration test populates computed KPI metrics on seeded postgres data
No ML imports in aggregates package phase2 paths AST scan
